ddls:
CREATE TABLE "core_values" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each core value */,
  "core_value" TEXT /* Name of the core value (e.g., DILIGENCE, INTEGRITY) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the core value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the author belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the author */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the author was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the author's information was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the author (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the publisher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the publisher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the publisher belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the publisher */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the publisher was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the publisher's information was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the publisher (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content piece */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the content */,
  "body" TEXT /* Body of the content */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the content was created */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date the content was published */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who created the content */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publisher who reviewed and published the content */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the content (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the content */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the content was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the content */,
  "views_count" INTEGER /* Number of views the content has received */,
  "likes_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes the content has received */,
  "comments_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments the content has received */,
  "shares_count" INTEGER /* Number of shares the content has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the tag's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_category_map" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_tag_map" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the employee belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the employee */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the employee was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the employee's information was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the employee (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee was terminated (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_interests" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "interest" TEXT /* Interest of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id", "interest")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_roles" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was assigned */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the role (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id", "role")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_engagement" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., like, comment, share) */,
  "engagement_date" TEXT /* Date of engagement */,
  "content_version" INTEGER /* Version of the content at the time of engagement */,
  "engagement_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the engagement (e.g., comment text) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id", "employee_id", "engagement_type")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_views" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date of view */,
  "content_version" INTEGER /* Version of the content at the time of view */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id", "employee_id", "view_date")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_shares" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "share_date" TEXT /* Date of share */,
  "content_version" INTEGER /* Version of the content at the time of share */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id", "employee_id", "share_date")
)
